header.title: Chat
header.subtitle: Ask about meals, nutrition, or your next step.

offline.title: No internet connection
offline.subtitle: Reconnect to ask new questions. Your previous guidance is still here.

lock.offlineBody: You can still read this conversation. Sending returns when you are back online.
lock.disabledBody: AI Chat is currently disabled on the server. Your existing conversation stays visible, but sending and retry are unavailable.
lock.contextUnavailableBody: Your conversation is still here, but current meal or profile context could not be loaded. Retry in a moment.

limit.title: Not enough AI Credits
limit.body: You have {{balance}} of {{allocation}} AI Credits available. Next refresh: {{renewalDate}}.
limit.photoRequired: You need at least {{cost}} AI Credits to analyze a photo.

empty.title: How can I help today?
empty.subtitle: Get help with meals, nutrition, and next steps.

starters.week: How did I eat this week?

values.week: How did I eat this week?
values.protein: What's my protein intake like this week?
values.dinner: Help me plan a high-protein dinner with what I already log.
values.track: Am I on track today with calories and protein?

empty.s1: How did I eat this week?
empty.v1: How did I eat this week?
empty.v2: What's my protein intake like this week?
empty.v3: Help me plan a high-protein dinner with what I already log.
empty.v4: Am I on track today with calories and protein?

history.title: Conversations
history.subtitle: Pick up a thread or start a fresh one.
history.emptyDescription: Start a new chat to see your conversations here.
history.offlineEmpty: No local conversations yet. Connect to sync your chat history.
history.refreshError: Please try again when your connection is stable.

errors.fetchFailed: Could not fetch a response. Please try again.
errors.offTopic: I can only answer questions related to nutrition and diet.
errors.rateLimited: You're sending messages too quickly. Please wait a moment.
errors.offline: You're offline. Reconnect and try again.
errors.timeout: The request timed out. Please retry.
errors.serviceUnavailable: AI is temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly.
errors.disabled: AI Chat is temporarily disabled. Please try again later.
errors.creditsExhausted: You have no AI Credits left for chat. Refreshing your balance and plans.
errors.consentRequired: AI Chat needs your health-data consent before it can answer.
errors.contextUnavailable: Meal or profile context is temporarily unavailable. Retry in a moment.
errors.idempotencyConflict: This message is still being reconciled. Wait a moment before trying again.
errors.internal: AI Chat failed before a response was generated. Please try again.
errors.authRequired: Please sign in again to continue.
errors.emptyResponse: I couldn't generate a useful response. Please try again.

paywall.autorenew: Payment will be charged to your account at confirmation of purchase. Subscription automatically renews unless canceled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period. Your account will be charged for renewal within 24 hours prior to the end of the current period. You can manage and cancel subscriptions in your {{storeName}} account settings.

legal.title: Before we start your AI chat
legal.informational: This chat offers general support with diet, nutrition, and meal planning.
legal.medical: It does not replace medical advice or a one-to-one consultation with a clinician.
legal.composerLocked: Accept the notice to unlock chat
